generic_rules: Focus repairs on the scope of the diagnostic; move bindings to implementation annexes if they reference implementation details.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
Ensure AGREE scalar types are correctly named (int, real, bool).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `eq` for definitions and `const` for constant values.
Guarantees should express properties of visible component features.
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to resolve AGREE type errors; fix the expression or remove the clause.
Avoid referencing subcomponent paths or implementation details in component type contracts.
